testcase.name: download-mtags-jar-based

failure.message: munit.FailException: tests/unit/src/test/scala/tests/FallbackDownloadSuite.scala:24 Fallback should download mtags using local coursier 23: println(results) [7m24: assert([0m 25: results.exists(_.toString.contains("mtags_2.12.18-14.0.jar")),
